description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a clean, boxy silhouette and gently curved armrests. The upholstery is a solid, light gray fabric that appears soft and smooth, covering both the seat and backrest. Four large, loose cushions are arranged on the backrest—two in a muted blue and two in a dark charcoal gray—providing both comfort and a touch of color contrast. The sofa sits on four short, block-style wooden legs, slightly recessed under the frame for a subtle, contemporary look. The backrest is divided into two segments, each supporting a pair of cushions, and the seat consists of two wide, plush cushions. The overall design is minimalist yet inviting, suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with curved armrests, four contrasting blue and gray cushions, and short wooden block legs. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, all four cushions (two blue, two gray), and the curved armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the profile of the curved armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the segmented backrest, the tops of the blue and gray cushions, and the clean, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the sofa's depth, cushion arrangement, and the curved armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four large, loose back cushions (two blue, two dark gray) arranged in a row, with two wide seat cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests at each end, rising slightly above the seat level with a smooth, continuous profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed under the sofa frame, with a visible brown wood texture.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, segmented backrest divided into two sections, each supporting two loose cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
